body.title: Update illustrative DB-connection-string doc-examples to unseen_university identity
body.intention: I intend that illustrative DB-connection-string examples in source reflect the post-rename substrate identity (unseen_university), so a reader copying an example reaches the real role/DB and is not misled by the retired igor/Igor-wild-0001 name.
body.description:
**Problem:** ~18 non-test source files carried illustrative DB-connection-string examples (`postgresql://igor:<password>@.../Igor-wild-0001`) that predate the role/DB rename to unseen_university. These are doc-examples with `<password>`/`...` placeholders, distinct from (a) instance-folder identity `Igor-wild-0001` which must STAY, and (b) executable skill psql (separate ticket T-uu-sweep-skill-psql-creds).

**Shape:** In connection-string context only, `igor:` -> `unseen_university:` and the host-suffixed `/Igor-wild-0001` -> `/unseen_university`; keep `<password>`/`<instance-db>` placeholders; leave every instance-identity `Igor-wild-0001` (IGOR_INSTANCE_ID, `~/.unseen_university/Igor-wild-0001`, instance-folder docstrings) untouched.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/paths.py (line 68 only), devices/queue/mcp_server.py, devlab/claudecode/slate_manager.py, devlab/claudecode/seed_layer3_*.py + seed_layer4_*.py (13), docs/palace_schema.md, scripts/palace_bootstrap.py.
**Design rules:** no live creds in source; preserve instance-identity (negative check).
**Scope boundary:** IN — illustrative examples with placeholders. OUT — tests/ (dead fallback, harmless), skill executable psql (T-uu-sweep-skill-psql-creds), historical handoff .md, *.template/*.example.
**Test plan:** no red/green lever for illustrative text -> shipped-unproven. Verification: positive `grep -rn 'postgres(ql)?://igor:'` over the Category-1 files = zero; negative — instance-identity Igor-wild-0001 lines intact.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Updated 18 non-test source files' illustrative DB-string examples (igor:->unseen_university:, /Igor-wild-0001->/unseen_university) in connection-string context; placeholders + instance-identity left intact (positive grep zero, negative check clean). Commit df3620c2.
body.unproven_reason: No hollow-build-failable proof for illustrative doc-string text — a stub could 'pass' any prose assertion. Verification was the positive (zero old-role conn-strings) + negative (instance-identity untouched) grep pair, recorded in the commit; no red->green lever exists for example text.
